summary: Excellent soundboard capture of a Godchaux‑era show, highlighted by a killer drum‑to‑Other One transition and a superb Big River jam.
review: The recording delivers crystal‑clear soundboard quality that lets the magic of the Godchaux years shine through. Musically the performance stands out with an electrifying drum roll into The Other One and a thrilling, keyboard‑rich rendition of Big River. Both reviewers praised these moments, making this release a must‑listen for fans.

ai_rating.rationale: Both reviews are highly positive (4–5 stars) and highlight strong musical moments plus excellent soundboard quality; limited to two reviews, so confidence is moderate.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Clear, crisp soundboard capture noted as "great quality" with no reported issues.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Strong momentum with seamless transitions, especially the killer drum‑to‑Other One segue and a flowing Big River jam.

band_member_comments.Keys: Nice keyboard work highlighted on the Big River performance.
band_member_comments.Drums: Killer transition from drums into The Other One praised by reviewers.
